programme.title: My Kidnapped Son
programme.desc: Released from prison, a woman tries to find out where her child vanished to while she was away.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Elizabeth Thomas Story With Elizabeth Smart
programme.desc: Elizabeth Thomas shares new revelations about her ordeal with kidnapping survivor Elizabeth Smart.

programme.title: Sinister Stepsister
programme.desc: A woman attempts to learn the truth about her biological father, who was unaware of her existence.

programme.title: Surviving the Sleepover
programme.desc: A teen's mother becomes her only chance of survival when a sleepover takes a sinister turn.

programme.title: Secrets Between Sisters
programme.desc: A woman gets pulled into a dark web of deceit after her sister dies at an underground club.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets: Joyce Mitchell
programme.desc: Erik Jensen reveals the tactics that inmates used to convince Joyce to help them escape.

programme.title: Sinister Stepsister
programme.desc: A woman attempts to learn the truth about her biological father, who was unaware of her existence.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets: Joyce Mitchell
programme.desc: Erik Jensen reveals the tactics that inmates used to convince Joyce to help them escape.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: A reporter (Chloë Sevigny) investigates the sinister activities of separated conjoined twins.

programme.title: A Sister's Secret
programme.desc: When twin sisters secretly swap places, a prank becomes a nightmare when one of them is murdered.

programme.title: Bad Nanny
programme.desc: A woman becomes a nanny to her half sister's daughter and wreaks havoc on both of their lives.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Watts Family Tragedy
programme.desc: A deeper look into the circumstances surrounding the Chris Watts murder case.
